basic_details.short_information: National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) has published the Young Professional (Gallery Explainer) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 10/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Young Professional (Gallery Explainer) positions on a contractual basis. Candidates aged up to 35 years and holding an MA/M.Sc. in Museology, Linguistics, or Anthropology with good knowledge of Linguistic Anthropology from a recognized university are eligible to participate in the recruitment process. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview scheduled for 10 June 2026. The official notification PDF and

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MA/M.Sc in Museology, Linguistics or Anthropology with good knowledge on Linguistic Anthropology from a recognized university
qualification.details: MA/M.Sc in Museology, Linguistics or Anthropology with good knowledge on Linguistic Anthropology from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional (Gallery Explainer) posts will be held on 10 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MA/M.Sc degree in Museology, Linguistics, or Anthropology with good knowledge of Linguistic Anthropology from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional (Gallery Explainer) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 35,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Young Professional (Gallery Explainer) position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Test/Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the NCSM office in Kolkata, West Bengal, PIN 700091.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity with the National Council of Science Museums (NCSM).
